title: OCI Console Login Brute Force (Frequency Analysis)
description: Detects brute force or credential stuffing against OCI Console by counting failed login attempts per user. Uses frequency analysis (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Sorting/Stacking method) to identify accounts with more than 3 failed attempts in the time window.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.consolesignon.login' and Status = 'Failure' | stats count as failed_attempts by 'User Name' | sort -failed_attempts | where failed_attempts > 3
